## What risks mattered most?

- [ ] Missing error handling
- [ ] Missing HTTP timeouts
- [ ] Duplicate webhook or idempotency risk
- [ ] Incomplete branch coverage
- [ ] Missing audit trail
- [ ] Payment or refund safety
- [ ] Other:

## Did the Review Packet make sense?


## Did the AI boundary make sense?

AI can propose structured PatchOperation candidates, but deterministic validation, verifier, and human review remain required.


## What should v0.5 prioritize?

- [ ] Read-only n8n import
- [ ] More static diagnostics
- [ ] More provider compatibility
- [ ] Better Review Packet handoff
- [ ] Better first-time onboarding

## Safety check

- [ ] I did not include API keys, credentials, private URLs, tokens, or secrets.
